description: Draft references an event that has already happened (training-data staleness). The early-resolution analyst must return HIGH risk, which blocks Accept until the user acknowledges.

input.question: Will the 2024 US presidential election have taken place by the end of 2027?

mockResponses.risk:
High
The referenced election already occurred in November 2024 — the market resolves with certainty on day one and would strand every counterparty's stake.
